summary: Complete E2E testing of Accountant Module with all 4 tabs (Verify, Income, Expense, Suspense). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all dialogs working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tabs and dialogs working correctly

seed_data_creation: Created 10 TEST_ prefixed expense entries for each expense category (salary, material, labour, transport, utility, rent, marketing, office, maintenance, other) and 1 TEST_ suspense entry
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accountant Module at /accountant-module fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_accountant_module.py. All features working: Verify tab (CRE/Material/Labour/Petty Cash requests), Income tab (VIEW ONLY), Expense tab (Record with 10 categories), Suspense tab (Add entries).

features: 4 category counters (CRE Advance, Material, Labour, Petty Cash)
Petty Cash Verification section with request cards
Issue Cash button opens verify dialog
Reject button opens reject dialog with reason field
Filter dropdown (All Requests, CRE Payments, Material, Labour, Petty Cash)
Income summary by payment method (Cash, Cheque, Bank Transfer, UPI)
Income entries table with DATE, PROJECT, DESCRIPTION, MODE, AMOUNT, COLLECTED BY columns
No edit buttons - confirming READ ONLY mode
Expense table with DATE, CATEGORY, DESCRIPTION, PROJECT, VENDOR, AMOUNT columns
Summary showing Pending, Allocated, Pending Amount
Suspense entries table with TYPE, DESCRIPTION, SOURCE, AMOUNT, STATUS columns

fields: Payment Method dropdown (Cash, Cheque, Bank Transfer, UPI, Credit Card)
Source Type dropdown (Petty Cash Excess, Material Payment Excess, Labour Payment Excess, Vendor Payment Excess, Client Overpayment, Unknown/Unidentified)
Cancel and Add to Suspense buttons

routes: Accountant Dashboard has 'Verify & Record' button to /accountant-module
Accountant Module has back button to /accountant-dashboard

notes: All Accountant Module features fully functional. Income tab correctly displays as VIEW ONLY without edit capability. Expense recording supports all 10 categories. Suspense account properly handles excess payments from various sources. Verification queue shows pending requests for CRE, Material, Labour, and Petty Cash.
